---
id: create-payment-transaction-checkout
title: "Create a new Payment Transaction"
description: "The objective of the  POST request is to facilitate the creation of payment transactions and the subsequent generation of payment links, each of which is associated with a unique session ID. These links can be effortlessly shared with customers through a range of communication channels, including email, WhatsApp, and SMS. Additionally, it is possible to incorporate the customer's billing and shipping information into the transaction. Moreover, users of this API have the ability to include diverse forms of data and information within the body request."
sidebar_label: "Create a new Payment Transaction"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/developers/apis/ottu-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Create a new Payment Transaction"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/b/checkout/v1/pymt-txn/"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



The objective of the  POST request is to facilitate the creation of payment transactions and the subsequent generation of payment links, each of which is associated with a unique session ID. These links can be effortlessly shared with customers through a range of communication channels, including email, WhatsApp, and SMS. Additionally, it is possible to incorporate the customer's billing and shipping information into the transaction. Moreover, users of this API have the ability to include diverse forms of data and information within the body request.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

  parameters={null}
